use_cases: Enable or disable settings in a preferences panel
Control feature flags in SaaS applications
Switch between active/inactive states in e-commerce product options
Toggle dark/light mode or other UI preferences
ai_summary: A customizable toggle switch component with support for multiple colors, sizes (small/large), and optional icons. Features smooth CSS transitions for state changes, disabled state handling, and flexible label/icon placement. Built with Tailwind CSS for easy integration into modern web applications.
